zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Carew, Esq II於大約1398年出生在英國素瑞貝丁頓時，他的父親Nicholas Carew Esq.37歲，母親Isabel De La Mare37歲。他於大約1435年與Margaret Fiennes結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年4月20日在英國素瑞享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦貝丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Carew, Esq II于大约1398年出生在英国素瑞貝丁頓时，他的父亲Nicholas Carew Esq.37岁，母亲Isabel De La Mare37岁。他于大约1435年与Margaret Fiennes结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1458年4月20日在英国素瑞享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦貝丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Carew,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, James Patrick, Kieran.

Welsh (Pembrokeshire): habitational name from any of various minor places in Wales, in particular one near Pembroke with a major castle, named from Welsh caer ‘fort’ + rhiw ‘hill, slope’. The surname was taken to Ireland soon after the Norman invasion of England and was Gaelicized as de Carrún. In the 16th century a family called Carew from Devon played an important part in establishing the Tudor administration in Ireland.
Cornish (Somerset and Devon): from the cognate Cornish word kerrow (plural of ker ‘fort’), which occurs seven times as a placename in Cornwall.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Carew, Esq II was born about 1398, in Beddington, Surrey, England, his father, Nicholas Carew Esq., was 37 and his mother, Isabel De La Mare, was 37. He married Margaret Fiennes about 1435. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 20 April 1458, in Surrey, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Beddington, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Carew, Esq II est né environ 1398, à Beddington, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Carew Esq., avait 37 ans et sa mère, Isabel De La Mare, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fiennes environ 1435. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1458, à Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Beddington, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Carew, Esq II um 1398 in Beddington, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Carew Esq. 37 und seine Mutter Isabel De La Mare 37. Er hat um 1435 Margaret Fiennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 20. April 1458 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Surrey, England und wurde in Beddington, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Carew, Esq II è nato il circa 1398 nel Beddington, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Carew Esq., aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Isabel De La Mare, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Fiennes circa 1435. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 aprile 1458, nel Surrey, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Beddington, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Carew, Esq IIが約1398年にイギリススリーベッドイントンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Carew Esq.は37歳，母Isabel De La Mareは37歳であった。約1435年にMargaret Fiennesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1458年4月20日にイギリススリーで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンベッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Carew, Esq II(이)가 대략 1398년 영국 수리 베딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Carew Esq.(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel De La Mare(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1435년 Margaret Fiennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 4월 20일 영국 수리에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 베딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Carew, Esq II nasceu aproximadamente 1398, em Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Carew Esq., tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Isabel De La Mare, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Fiennes aproximadamente 1435. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de abril de 1458, em Surrey, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Beddington, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Carew, Esq II родился около 1398 г. в местности беддингтон, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Carew Esq. было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel De La Mare, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fiennes около 1435 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 20 апреля 1458 г. в местности сурри, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности беддингтон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Carew, Esq II nació aproximadamente 1398, en Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Carew Esq., tenía 37 años y su mamá, Isabel De La Mare, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Margaret Fiennes aproximadamente 1435. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de abril de 1458, en Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Beddington, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
